name: Zilong

skills.name: Dragon's Roar
skills.description: As his Health declines, he gains more damage reduction and his basic skills are enhanced.

skills.name: Thunderbreaker
skills.description: Charges forward, dealing damage and enhancing his next Basic Attack. This skill's cooldown is reset whenever his Health reaches a certain level.

skills.name: Stormpiercer
skills.description: Jabs repeatedly in the target direction, dealing damage. Recovers Health on hit.

skills.name: Skysplitter
skills.description:
Leaps to the target area to deal damage, launching enemies in the center.
50% of the cooldown is returned if no heroes are hit.

skillsZh.name: 龍鳴
skillsZh.description: 趙雲生命降低會迸發潛能，提升減傷比例並強化基礎技能。

skillsZh.name: 驚雷之龍
skillsZh.description: 趙雲向前突刺，造成傷害並強化下一次普攻，趙雲的被動檔位發生變化時，可以重置【驚雷之龍】的冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 破雲之龍
skillsZh.description: 趙雲朝指定方向連續刺擊，造成傷害，命中單位後回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 天翔之龍
skillsZh.description:
趙雲躍向指定區域，造成傷害並擊飛中心的敵人。
未命中英雄時，返還50%的冷卻時間。

tips: Build: Master Sword, Frostscar's Embrace, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 趙雲（打野）：梯度 A，勝率 51.9%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、冰痕之握、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.detail: Skill 2 is Zilong's main damage skill, but its damage output is somewhat lacking if it doesn't trigger his passive. Hence, we've slightly increased Skill 2's damage.

patchHistory.change: The cooldown is returned if no heroes are hit by his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: When Zilong's Ultimate fails to hit the enemy, he struggles to put pressure on them, so we want to improve his cooldown mechanics to give him more opportunities to engage in team fights. We also improved his late-game cooldowns, giving the opponent time to counterattack after being hit by an Ultimate.

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「2技能作為趙雲的主要輸出技能，在沒有觸發被動的額外效果時傷害略顯不足，因此我們適當提高了2技能的傷害。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 大招未命中英雄時歸還冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 趙雲的大招若未命中敵人時，他對敵人的威脅性就會降低很多，因此我們希望最佳化大招的冷卻機制，讓趙雲能夠有更多嘗試開戰的機會；與此同時提升了後期的冷卻，在大招命中後，能留給對手一定的反制空間。

faqs.question: Is Zilong good in current season?
faqs.answer: Zilong is Tier A Assassin with 51.9% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Zilong build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Frostscar's Embrace, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Zilong?
faqs.answer: Pick Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang. Strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer.

faqsZh.question: 趙雲 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 趙雲 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.9%、選取 0.8%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 趙雲 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、冰痕之握、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 趙雲？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Guiguzi、Ziya、Fang。趙雲 克制 Lapulapu、Ata、Sakeer。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Weak into: Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang.

guide.overview: Zilong is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 52.7% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Zilong: The lower his Health, the greater his damage reduction and skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Pure Sky, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Zilong's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Thunderbreaker → Stormpiercer → Skysplitter → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.reason: Stormpiercer provides mobility or stick—max first. Thunderbreaker second for damage. Skysplitter on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Thunderbreaker → Stormpiercer → Skysplitter → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Skysplitter after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Zilong sits at Tier B globally (52.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Zilong vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Zilong has +2.9% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Zilong when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Zilong vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Zilong has +2.0% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Zilong when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Zilong excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Guiguzi, Ziya, Fang without team peel.
